one_time_description: Specific Claim (Conn Claim) settlement of $37,000,000 received during the year
economic_notes: Two government business enterprises: Penelakut Seafood Ltd. (100% owned, fishing operations) and Spune'lexutth' Holdings Incorporated (100% owned). Both accounted for on modified equity basis. Spune'lexutth' Holdings had revenues of $775,373 and a loss of $74,729 for year ended March 31, 2024.
notes: Large one-time Specific Claim (Conn Claim) settlement of $37,000,000 received in 2024, driving accumulated surplus from $27.3M to $61.0M. Restricted cash jumped from $3.8M to $50.1M primarily due to $37M settlement funds held. Two GBEs (Penelakut Seafood Ltd. and Spune'lexutth' Holdings Inc.) accounted for on modified equity basis and not consolidated. No schedule of remuneration was included in the financial statements provided. Expenses by object show $6,710,000 in specific claim distributions. Total salaries calculated from expenses by object: wages $4,502,510 + benefits $662,101 = $5,164,611. annual_debt_service based on 2025 estimated principal reduction schedule. OSR calculated as total revenue minus ISC ($19,645,447), Health Authority ($1,605,934), CSETS ($277,983), Province of BC ($1,542,900), FNESC ($1,210,120) = $33,022,277 which includes rent, specific claim, and deferred revenue adjustments.
